fact: November 27 is exactly 331 days into the year, which means there are only 34 days left until New Year's Eve!

Arctic foxes are busy growing their thick white winter coats right around this time, transforming from brownish summer fluff balls into snow-white ninjas.
The sun sets before 5 PM in most northern cities on November 27, making it feel like bedtime when you're barely done with dinner.

Squirrels are in full panic mode around November 27, frantically burying nuts like tiny furry doomsday preppers.

The morning frost in cold places creates ice crystals that look like nature's own glitter bomb exploded overnight.
November 27 is exactly one month before December 27, making it the perfect day to start panicking about holiday shopping.
